<!--
We promise everything shown is fetched live from the original source.
If something looks wrong, open this issue and we will look into it and reach out.

If the data is wrong at the source itself (LineageOS, TWRP, OrangeFox, etc.)
we cannot fix it here — but tell us anyway and we will confirm which side the problem is on.

Exception: the Android versions page is seeded from a reference table, not a live scrape.
If a version is missing or wrong there, that is something we can fix directly.
-->

## How does it look wrong?

- [ ] Stale — looks like an old cached value
- [ ] Hardcoded — same wrong value every time even after a page refresh
- [ ] Just wrong — the upstream source is also showing wrong data
